evidence: Another Lovecraft made movie. Real scary.
Any thing about Godzilla I will look at.
It takes a while before we see a 'Creature'.
you really don't see the Monster till the end.
I liked the movie, thanks for the subtitles.
Michael Rooker is good. He is an excellent actor in any movie he makes.
Brian Steele, 'Creature Boy' and one of the best if not the best creature suit actor in the business today plays the Creature.
Love this movie. saw it when I was young and still like it.
I have a big respect for this particular actor.

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and horror genres, particularly enjoying films with visual spectacle and atmospheric elements. They show loyalty to specific actors and appreciate emotional resonance in their viewing experiences.
